G: timestamp_skew_fix

P: static_threshold∧rejects_valid∧no_skew_allowance∧"401"_false_positive
V: skew_buffer∧dynamic_window∧provider_tolerance∧delta_guard

G: ship_compliant_system

G: path_traversal_risk

P: validate_query ∧ strip_traversal ∧ whitelist_files

Verify: allowlist_check and "sort" and reject_unknown.
Answer target: parameterize and "SELECT" and safe_column_map.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and minimal_change and preserve_order.
Plan: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Verify: "await" and db.fetchRows and db.save and emit_metrics.
Answer target: catch_db_err and "next(err)" and "async" and reconcileBatch.

G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
